FeatureSpec.signature: (name: 'str', role: 'str', dtype: 'str', shape: 'tuple[int, ...]', unit: 'str', frame: 'str', rate_hz: 'float | None', normalization: 'str', source_key: 'str', required_by: 'tuple[str, ...]' = ()) -> None
